title: Fenn's Block Chests
description: Updates the outdated chest texture while also bringing back the classic full block look!
body:
[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) is **REQUIRED** for this pack to work properly!

# Fenn's Block Chests
The current chest textures are very outdated, still using its texture from the Beta days. So i felt i'd try making my version of what an updated chest would look like, while also bringing back some elements from Beta! Making the chest a full block again like it used to be. I never really understood the change to make the chest smaller i feel the chest as a full block fits into the style of minecraft much nicer, so hopefull my niche itch is useful to others too haha!

![All Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b55dc45d3d3973b80d2ad1a49486d956c98919c.png)

## Christmas Variants too!
Ive also updated the christmas variants to be more close to modern minecraft standards, while also adding variants to other chests that didnt have ones before! Also extending the time these chests are available from Dec 1st to the 26th!

![All Christmas Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53c99df69ae7b5ee71435a95b7089e49ea4c8d4f.png)
